title: The Rise of Generative UI for Developers (CopilotKit)
summary: CopilotKit is a framework that helps developers move beyond bolted-on chatbots to agent-native applications. It enables AI agents to render real UI components, share application state with React/Next.js apps, and support human-in-the-loop approval workflows for AI-driven features.
writeup: This video covers CopilotKit, a framework for building agent-native applications rather than bolting a chatbot onto an existing app. It matters because it shifts AI from a side panel to a participant in the interface itself. The concrete takeaways: AI agents can render real UI components, share application state with React and Next.js apps, and support human-in-the-loop approval workflows for AI-driven features.
